text: Kiton | Discover the Artisanal Tradition and Tailoring Excellence Skip to content SPRING SUMMER 26 DISCOVER THE CAMPAIGN Spring • Summer 26 MAN Check out the collection SPRING • SUMMER 26 WOMAN Check out the collection CHECK OUT THE MAGIC Intersections Languages and cultures: we explore the world that drives us Check out the KNT collection LIVING AT YOUR OWN PACE In a world in constant motion, living at your own pace becomes an act of quiet elegance and conscious choice. The Spring–Summer 2026 collection is born from this philosophy: not from slowing down, but from the freedom to define one’s own rhythm, one’s own time, one’s own space. To live at your own pace is freedom, privilege, art. An art expressed through every garment, where each detail unfolds into an experience of harmony and authenticity. A journey through timeless elegance, shaped by the brand’s iconic materials and signatures, inspired by art, culture, and an uncompromising pursuit of quality.
